Added_Other.name: FFlagMakeupDontComposeSingleMakeupAsset
Added_Other.mechanism: Prevents the combination of single makeup assets into a composite.
Added_Other.purpose: Gives players more control over their character customization without unnecessary complexity.

Added_Other.purpose: Ensures a consistent experience for players when interacting with game captures.
